variants._comment:: ($self$) 申请成为挚友 口上文
($self$) 拒绝成为挚友 口上文
($self$) 被拒绝成为挚友 口上文
($self$) 挚友关系破裂 口上文

zh-cn.relationship_bff_propose_1: $self$有些局促地搓了搓手，视线游移不定。"那个……如果不介意的话，我们能不能试着多了解彼此一点？"
zh-cn.relationship_bff_propose_2: $self$深吸了一口气，像是下定了某种决心。"我觉得和你挺合得来的，要不要……交个朋友试试？"
zh-cn.relationship_bff_propose_3: $self$拿出一张写着联系方式的纸条递过去，动作略显僵硬。"如果不嫌弃的话，以后常联系。"
zh-cn.relationship_bff_propose_4: $self$看着$target$，语气里带着一丝试探。"总觉得我们能成为不错的朋友，你觉得呢？"
zh-cn.relationship_bff_propose_5: $self$尴尬地挠了挠头，"虽然有点突然，但我想我们可以相处得更融洽一些。"
zh-cn.relationship_bff_propose_6: $self$小声嘀咕着，眼神却时不时飘向$target$。"那个……如果不麻烦的话，希望能和你走得更近一点。"
zh-cn.relationship_bff_propose_7: $self$自然地把手搭在$target$的肩膀上，笑得灿烂。"喂，我们也算是知根知底了吧？以后就是铁哥们了！"
zh-cn.relationship_bff_propose_8: $self$从口袋里掏出两个一模一样的挂件，扔给$target$一个。"拿着，这是我们友谊的证明，不许弄丢哦！"
zh-cn.relationship_bff_propose_9: $self$认真地注视着$target$的双眼，语气坚定。"我觉得，我已经离不开你了……作为最好的朋友。"
zh-cn.relationship_bff_propose_10: $self$举起手中的饮料，向$target$示意。"为了我们牢不可破的友谊，干杯！"
zh-cn.relationship_bff_propose_11: $self$伸出小指，脸上带着孩子气的执着。"来，拉勾！约定好了，我们要做一辈子的死党！"
zh-cn.relationship_bff_propose_12: $self$凑近$target$的耳边，神秘兮兮地说道："我已经把你从‘熟人’升级到‘挚友’列表啦，感到荣幸吧！"
zh-cn.relationship_bff_set_1: $self$显然有些意外，眼睛微微睁大。"真的吗？太好了，我还以为会被拒绝呢。"
zh-cn.relationship_bff_set_2: $self$露出了一个如释重负的笑容。"谢谢你愿意接纳我，我会努力做一个好朋友的。"
zh-cn.relationship_bff_set_3: $self$有些不知所措地握紧了拳头，随后松开。"那……以后就请多指教了，朋友。"
zh-cn.relationship_bff_set_4: $self$脸上的拘谨瞬间消散，换上了一副轻松的表情。"哈，这下我也算是有靠山的人了。"
zh-cn.relationship_bff_set_5: $self$腼腆地笑了笑，低头看着脚尖。"其实……我也一直希望能和你这样相处。"
zh-cn.relationship_bff_set_6: $self$轻轻点了点头，眼神里多了几分温度。"很高兴能和你达成共识。"
zh-cn.relationship_bff_set_7: $self$兴奋地一把抱住了$target$，完全不顾形象。"我就知道你会答应的！太棒了！"
zh-cn.relationship_bff_set_8: $self$用力拍了拍$target$的后背，笑得合不拢嘴。"哈哈，这下我们就是最佳拍档了，谁也别想把我们分开！"
zh-cn.relationship_bff_set_9: $self$得意地昂起头，眼神里满是骄傲。"哼哼，那是当然的，除了我谁还能做你的死党？"
zh-cn.relationship_bff_set_10: $self$激动地在原地转了个圈。"今晚必须庆祝一下！不醉不归！"
zh-cn.relationship_bff_set_11: $self$紧紧握住$target$的手，眼神里闪烁着感动的光芒。"谢谢你，$target$，这对我来说真的很重要。"
zh-cn.relationship_bff_set_12: $self$对着天空大喊了一声。"听到了吗？这就是默契！我们是绝配！"
zh-cn.relationship_bff_refuse_1: $self$礼貌地后退半步，保持着社交距离。"抱歉，我觉得我们现在的距离刚刚好。"
zh-cn.relationship_bff_refuse_2: $self$有些为难地笑了笑，眼神却很冷淡。"我现在没有精力去经营一段新的友谊，抱歉。"
zh-cn.relationship_bff_refuse_3: $self$摇了摇头，语气平静得近乎冷漠。"我不觉得这是一个好主意，我们还是保持现状吧。"
zh-cn.relationship_bff_refuse_4: $self$避开了$target$伸出的手。"我不习惯和别人走得太近，希望你能理解。"
zh-cn.relationship_bff_refuse_5: $self$叹了口气，坦率地说道："说实话，我对你还不够了解，没法答应你。"
zh-cn.relationship_bff_refuse_6: $self$看着别处，声音很轻。"有些界限还是不要打破比较好。"
zh-cn.relationship_bff_refuse_7: $self$脸上的笑容瞬间凝固，随后变成了苦笑。"别开玩笑了……你知道我不适合做任何人的挚友。"
zh-cn.relationship_bff_refuse_8: $self$痛苦地闭上眼睛，低声说道："不行……如果太亲近的话，我怕最后会伤害到你。"
zh-cn.relationship_bff_refuse_9: $self$推开了$target$，情绪有些激动。"维持现状不好吗？为什么非要改变什么？！"
zh-cn.relationship_bff_refuse_10: $self$低着头，手指不安地绞在一起。"我……我还没准备好承担那样的责任。"
zh-cn.relationship_bff_refuse_11: $self$看着$target$，眼神里满是挣扎。"你值得更好的朋友，而不是像我这样的……"
zh-cn.relationship_bff_refuse_12: $self$转过身去，不想让$target$看到自己的表情。"算了吧，一旦越过了那条线，有些东西就回不去了。"
zh-cn.relationship_bff_refused_1: $self$愣了一下，随即尴尬地收回了手。"啊……是这样啊，没关系，是我唐突了。"
zh-cn.relationship_bff_refused_2: $self$勉强挤出一个笑容，掩饰着眼底的失落。"哈哈，我也只是随口一说，别往心里去。"
zh-cn.relationship_bff_refused_3: $self$低下头，轻轻咬着嘴唇。"明白了……看来是我自作多情了。"
zh-cn.relationship_bff_refused_4: $self$深吸了一口气，努力维持着体面。"没关系，做普通朋友也挺好的。"
zh-cn.relationship_bff_refused_5: $self$耸了耸肩，故作轻松。"被拒绝了呢……好吧，那就不打扰你了。"
zh-cn.relationship_bff_refused_6: $self$沉默了片刻，然后转身离开。"那么，之后见。"
zh-cn.relationship_bff_refused_7: $self$像是被人狠狠打了一拳，难以置信地看着$target$。"为什么……我以为我们之间……"
zh-cn.relationship_bff_refused_8: $self$眼眶瞬间红了，声音颤抖着。"原来在你心里，我连这点位置都没有吗？"
zh-cn.relationship_bff_refused_9: $self$慌乱地想要解释什么，却语无伦次。"是我哪里做得不对吗？我可以改的，真的！"
zh-cn.relationship_bff_refused_10: $self$呆呆地站在原地，手中的礼物掉在地上。"骗人的吧……这怎么可能……"
zh-cn.relationship_bff_refused_11: $self$用力咬住嘴唇直到出血，强忍着泪水。"好……我知道了。我不会再提了。"
zh-cn.relationship_bff_refused_12: $self$发出了一声自嘲的冷笑，眼神瞬间黯淡下去。"原来这就是你的答案啊……真可笑。"
zh-cn.relationship_bff_break_1: $self$冷冷地看着$target$，眼神像是在看一个陌生人。"以后别再跟我说话了，我嫌恶心。"
zh-cn.relationship_bff_break_2: $self$直接删除了终端里的联系方式，动作没有一丝犹豫。"我们到此为止。"
zh-cn.relationship_bff_break_3: $self$发出一声轻蔑的哼声，转身就走。"浪费我的时间。"
zh-cn.relationship_bff_break_4: $self$厌恶地拍了拍刚才碰到$target$的地方。"真后悔认识你。"
zh-cn.relationship_bff_break_5: $self$面无表情地挡住了$target$的路。"离我远点，这是最后的警告。"
zh-cn.relationship_bff_break_6: $self$将手中的东西狠狠摔在地上。"滚！"
zh-cn.relationship_bff_break_7: $self$泪流满面地看着$target$，眼神里满是绝望。"我那么信任你……你怎么能这样对我？！"
zh-cn.relationship_bff_break_8: $self$声音嘶哑，仿佛用尽了全身力气。"我真希望从来没有遇见过你……"
zh-cn.relationship_bff_break_9: $self$无力地瘫坐在地上，双手捂住脸。"毁了……一切都毁了……"
zh-cn.relationship_bff_break_10: $self$将合照撕得粉碎，碎片像雪花一样飘落。"从今往后，我们恩断义绝。"
zh-cn.relationship_bff_break_11: $self$看着$target$的眼神空洞无物，仿佛灵魂已经被抽走。"你杀死了那个曾经信任你的我。"
zh-cn.relationship_bff_break_12: $self$颤抖着指着门口，歇斯底里地尖叫。"滚出去！把属于你的一切都带走！"

en-us.relationship_bff_propose_1: $self$ rubs her hands together awkwardly, her gaze shifting. "Um... if you don't mind, could we try to get to know each other a bit better?"
en-us.relationship_bff_propose_2: $self$ takes a deep breath, as if steeling herself. "I feel like we get along pretty well. Do you want to... try being friends?"
en-us.relationship_bff_propose_3: $self$ hands over a slip of paper with contact info, her movements slightly stiff. "Keep in touch, if you'd like."
en-us.relationship_bff_propose_4: $self$ looks at $target$, a hint of probing in her tone. "I feel like we could be good friends. What do you think?"
en-us.relationship_bff_propose_5: $self$ scratches her head awkwardly. "It's a bit sudden, but I think we could get along even better."
en-us.relationship_bff_propose_6: $self$ mutters quietly, her eyes darting towards $target$ occasionally. "Um... if it's not too much trouble, I'd like to get closer to you."
en-us.relationship_bff_propose_7: $self$ naturally drapes her arm around $target$'s shoulder, grinning brightly. "Hey, we know each other pretty well now, right? We're total buddies from now on!"
en-us.relationship_bff_propose_8: $self$ pulls two identical charms from her pocket and tosses one to $target$. "Here, proof of our friendship. Don't lose it!"
en-us.relationship_bff_propose_9: $self$ stares earnestly into $target$'s eyes, her tone firm. "I think I can't be without you anymore... as a best friend."
en-us.relationship_bff_propose_10: $self$ raises her drink, gesturing to $target$. "To our unbreakable friendship, cheers!"
en-us.relationship_bff_propose_11: $self$ extends her pinky, a childish persistence on her face. "Come on, pinky promise! We're gonna be besties for life!"
en-us.relationship_bff_propose_12: $self$ leans close to $target$'s ear, whispering mysteriously, "I've upgraded you from 'Acquaintance' to 'Best Friend'. You should be honored!"
en-us.relationship_bff_set_1: $self$ is clearly surprised, her eyes widening slightly. "Really? That's great! I thought I'd be rejected."
en-us.relationship_bff_set_2: $self$ smiles with relief. "Thank you for accepting me. I'll do my best to be a good friend."
en-us.relationship_bff_set_3: $self$ clenches her fist in bewilderment, then relaxes. "Well then... please take care of me, friend."
en-us.relationship_bff_set_4: $self$ relaxes instantly, a casual expression replacing her restraint. "Ha, now I've got someone to watch my back."
en-us.relationship_bff_set_5: $self$ smiles shyly, looking down at her toes. "Actually... I've always hoped we could be like this."
en-us.relationship_bff_set_6: $self$ nods gently, her eyes warming up. "I'm glad we're on the same page."
en-us.relationship_bff_set_7: $self$ excitedly hugs $target$, disregarding her image completely. "I knew you'd say yes! This is awesome!"
en-us.relationship_bff_set_8: $self$ slaps $target$ on the back, grinning from ear to ear. "Haha, we're the best team now. No one can separate us!"
en-us.relationship_bff_set_9: $self$ lifts her head proudly. "Hmph, naturally. Who else could be your bestie but me?"
en-us.relationship_bff_set_10: $self$ spins around in excitement. "We have to celebrate tonight! Let's get wasted!"
en-us.relationship_bff_set_11: $self$ holds $target$'s hand tightly, her eyes shimmering with emotion. "Thank you, $target$. This really means a lot to me."
en-us.relationship_bff_set_12: $self$ shouts to the sky. "Did you hear that? This is destiny! We're a perfect match!"
en-us.relationship_bff_refuse_1: $self$ steps back politely, maintaining social distance. "Sorry, I think our current distance is just right."
en-us.relationship_bff_refuse_2: $self$ smiles awkwardly, but her eyes are cold. "I don't have the energy for a new friendship right now, sorry."
en-us.relationship_bff_refuse_3: $self$ shakes her head, her tone calm to the point of indifference. "I don't think that's a good idea. Let's keep things as they are."
en-us.relationship_bff_refuse_4: $self$ avoids $target$'s outstretched hand. "I'm not used to getting too close to people. I hope you understand."
en-us.relationship_bff_refuse_5: $self$ sighs and speaks frankly, "Honestly, I don't know you well enough to say yes."
en-us.relationship_bff_refuse_6: $self$ looks away, her voice soft. "Some boundaries are better left unbroken."
en-us.relationship_bff_refuse_7: $self$'s smile freezes, then turns bitter. "Don't joke around... You know I'm not cut out to be anyone's best friend."
en-us.relationship_bff_refuse_8: $self$ closes her eyes painfully, whispering, "No... if we get too close, I'm afraid I'll hurt you in the end."
en-us.relationship_bff_refuse_9: $self$ pushes $target$ away, getting emotional. "Isn't it fine the way it is? Why do you have to change things?!"
en-us.relationship_bff_refuse_10: $self$ lowers her head, fingers twisting together anxiously. "I... I'm not ready for that kind of responsibility."
en-us.relationship_bff_refuse_11: $self$ looks at $target$, struggle in her eyes. "You deserve a better friend, not someone like me..."
en-us.relationship_bff_refuse_12: $self$ turns away, hiding her expression from $target$. "Forget it. Once you cross that line, there's no going back."
en-us.relationship_bff_refused_1: $self$ freezes, then awkwardly retracts her hand. "Ah... I see. It's okay, I was being presumptuous."
en-us.relationship_bff_refused_2: $self$ forces a smile, hiding the disappointment in her eyes. "Haha, I was just saying. Don't take it to heart."
en-us.relationship_bff_refused_3: $self$ lowers her head, biting her lip gently. "Understood... I guess I was getting ahead of myself."
en-us.relationship_bff_refused_4: $self$ takes a deep breath, trying to maintain her dignity. "It's fine. Being just friends is good too."
en-us.relationship_bff_refused_5: $self$ shrugs, feigning nonchalance. "Rejected, huh... Well, I won't bother you then."
en-us.relationship_bff_refused_6: $self$ is silent for a moment, then turns to leave. "See you later, then."
en-us.relationship_bff_refused_7: $self$ looks at $target$ in disbelief, as if punched in the gut. "Why... I thought between us..."
en-us.relationship_bff_refused_8: $self$'s eyes redden instantly, her voice trembling. "So I don't even mean that much to you?"
en-us.relationship_bff_refused_9: $self$ tries to explain in a panic, incoherent. "Did I do something wrong? I can change, really!"
en-us.relationship_bff_refused_10: $self$ stands there dazed, dropping the gift. "You're lying... This can't be..."
en-us.relationship_bff_refused_11: $self$ bites her lip until it bleeds, holding back tears. "Okay... I get it. I won't bring it up again."
en-us.relationship_bff_refused_12: $self$ lets out a self-deprecating laugh, her eyes dimming instantly. "So that's your answer... How ridiculous."
en-us.relationship_bff_break_1: $self$ stares coldly at $target$, as if looking at a stranger. "Don't talk to me again. You disgust me."
en-us.relationship_bff_break_2: $self$ deletes the contact from her terminal without hesitation. "We are done here."
en-us.relationship_bff_break_3: $self$ snorts contemptuously and turns to leave. "Waste of my time."
en-us.relationship_bff_break_4: $self$ pats the spot $target$ touched with disgust. "I regret ever meeting you."
en-us.relationship_bff_break_5: $self$ blocks $target$'s path expressionlessly. "Stay away from me. This is your last warning."
en-us.relationship_bff_break_6: $self$ throws the item in her hand to the ground. "Get out!"
en-us.relationship_bff_break_7: $self$ looks at $target$ with tear-streaked face, eyes full of despair. "I trusted you so much... How could you do this to me?!"
en-us.relationship_bff_break_8: $self$ speaks hoarsely, as if drained of all strength. "I wish I had never met you..."
en-us.relationship_bff_break_9: $self$ collapses on the ground, covering her face with her hands. "Ruined... everything is ruined..."
en-us.relationship_bff_break_10: $self$ tears the photo into pieces, letting them fall like snow. "From now on, we are nothing to each other."
en-us.relationship_bff_break_11: $self$ looks at $target$ with empty eyes, as if her soul has been sucked out. "You killed the person who trusted you."
en-us.relationship_bff_break_12: $self$ points tremblingly at the door, screaming hysterically. "Get out! And take everything that belongs to you!"
